message:
Edge compute: diff-blobs, grep-blobs, walk-trees actions + inline diff API

Move compute to the data — workers read from R2 and process locally,
returning only results (patches, matches, tree entries), not raw bytes.
This keeps coordinator memory flat regardless of repo size.

New compute worker actions:
- diff-blobs: read blob pairs, compute Myers unified diff, return patches
- grep-blobs: read blobs, regex search with context lines, return matches
- walk-trees: read tree objects, parse entries, return child SHAs

New REST API endpoints:
- GET /diff?a=...&b=...&content=true — inline unified diffs per file
- GET /grep?pattern=...&ref=...&context=N — search repo content

Both diff and grep fan out to compute pool when file count exceeds
threshold (>10 for diff, >50 for grep), falling back to local path
for small repos. 93 tests, 31 conformance.
